username.title: Username Map
username.description: Maps unique usernames to Firebase Auth UIDs

uid.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the user

player.title: Player
player.description: Represents a physical player in the hide and seek game

game.description: The shared central real-time state of the game session

gameInProgress.description: Whether the game session is active

lastDrawTime.description: Timestamp of the last spin complete

currentSpin.description: State of any ongoing active wheel spin

/usernames/{username}.description: Maps clean lowercase usernames to UIDs
